label: 第255話
source_locator: 単行本29巻 目次 p.7
summary_short: ミゲルとラルゥが参戦し、夏油への弔いとして高専側へ協力する。ミゲルは術式で自らを強化し宿儺の能力を弱め、ラルゥは心をつかむ術式で隙を作る。
summary_full: ミゲルとラルゥが参戦し、夏油への弔いとして高専側へ協力する。ミゲルは術式で自らを強化し宿儺の能力を弱め、ラルゥは心をつかむ術式で隙を作る。ミゲルは肉体強化と相手の弱体化を同時に行う祈祷の歌で宿儺と渡り合う。ラルゥの心身掌握は巨大な手で身体を掴み、さらに心へ干渉できる。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: ミゲル and ラルゥ , allies of 夏油傑 , join the fight as a way to mourn their late friend. ミゲル needed serious convincing to take on 宿儺 , but the man who went toe-to-toe with 五条悟 proves he might just be the difference maker.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 夏油傑’s former commanders, ミゲル and ラルゥ, arrive in 新宿 to assist in the battle against 宿儺, rescuing 憂憂 and 日下部篤也 using their cursed techniques. ミゲル initially refused to fight 宿儺. Some time before the showdown between 五条悟 and 宿儺, 乙骨憂太 and ラルゥ traveled to Africa to meet ミゲル in an attempt to recruit him for the coming battle. ミゲル refused, believing 宿儺 to be too dangerous to face even in an exhausted state. Not even the possibility of the Great Merger threatening his homeland was enough to sway him, and he insisted that 五条 personally request his help if it was truly necessary. ラルゥ then asked 憂太 to leave him alone with ミゲル so the two could speak privately. After reflecting on their shared devotion to 夏油, ラルゥ persuades ミゲル to fight 宿儺 as a means of mourning their former leader together. ミゲル reluctantly agrees to participate in the raid under the condition that he only confront 宿儺 after 五条 and 憂太 have been defeated, and that 宿儺 be unable to use his domain . He also requests ラルゥ’s assistance in the battle. ミゲル goes toe-to-toe with 宿儺. In the present, ミゲル notes that 宿儺 can no longer deploy his domain and expresses gratitude to 五条 for making this possible. ラルゥ adds that 宿儺’s 反転術式 output is weakened, his lower left arm remains incomplete, his lower right arm is rendered unusable due to being split apart, and his heart has not fully healed. Concluding that 宿儺 is vulnerable, ミゲル and ラルゥ engage him in combat. The fight carries them into a large building, where ラルゥ restrains 宿儺 by crushing him against a wall with his hand-conjuring 術式 . 宿儺 destroys the conjured hand, causing a bloody gash to appear on ラルゥ’s right hand, and retaliates by unleashing slashes at both opponents. ラルゥ withstands the attacks while ミゲル evades the slashes and 宿儺’s follow-up kick with exceptional agility, before engaging 宿儺 directly in close combat. ラルゥ’s 術式, 心身掌握 , allows him to "grasp" a target by manifesting a virtual hand. Although the hand can be regenerated after destruction, ten percent of the damage inflicted upon it is reflected onto ラルゥ’s body. 宿儺 dismisses the technique as uninteresting, instead turning his attention to ミゲル’s 祈祷の歌 , which enhances ミゲル’s physical capabilities and repels curses by maintaining a rhythmic beat. 悠仁 and other sorcerers rejoin the fight. During 五条’s visit to Africa with 憂太, he explained that ミゲル’s 術式 allows him to strengthen himself while weakening his opponent without relying on a domain, making it particularly effective. ミゲル questioned how 五条 is aware of his technique, to which 五条 replied that observing it was enough to grasp its fundamentals. 五条 further commented that ミゲル’s physique makes him especially dangerous, stating that unlike the majority of sorcerers, who are Japanese, ミゲル’s different musculoskeletal structure combined with 呪力 reinforcement grants him exceptional physical abilities. ミゲル vehemently rejected this explanation as a racial stereotype and insists that his power is the result of personal effort, prompting 五条 to apologize. When 憂太 asked whether ミゲル would be a threat to him, 五条 replied metaphorically that without cursed techniques and relying solely on 呪力 reinforcement, he would win a marathon, but ミゲル would win a sprint. The black light's shine beckons an ill omen! In the present, as ミゲル continues to fight 宿儺 hand-to-hand, 宿儺 notices 脹相 positioned on a balcony behind him and quickly takes cover, causing 脹相’s 穿血 to miss. 宿儺 emerges and fires 解 at 脹相, which he's able to narrowly block at the cost of injuring his arms. 虎杖悠仁 crashes through the building’s ceiling and lands atop 宿儺, who sarcastically remarks on 悠仁’s persistence. Originally, in order to expand 解’s target and unleash a slash capable of cutting the world, 宿儺 needed only to form the Enmaten ( 閻魔天 , Enmaten ) hand signs—the same used to activate 伏魔御廚子 . However, after 五条’s unlimited 虚式「茈」 destroyed half of 宿儺’s arms, he was rendered incapable of performing the technique. To compensate, 宿儺 imposed a 縛り on the world-cutting 解, adding incantations and requiring him to guide the slash with his hand. Suddenly, 禪院真希 severs 宿儺’s upper left arm, revealing that she survived the 黒閃 inflicted upon her earlier. With only two right arms remaining and his 反転術式 output still unrecovered, 悠仁 believes the sorcerers finally have a chance to defeat 宿儺 and charges forward. At that moment, 宿儺 is blessed by the sparks of black and lands his second 黒閃 , this time on ラルゥ. As 五条 was able to restore his 反転術式 output after landing two 黒閃, 宿儺 now appears poised to achieve the same recovery.

candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 脹相の術式 赤血操術 穿血 呪具 釈魂刀 ラルゥ's 術式 心身掌握 ミゲル Oduol's 術式 祈祷の歌 宿儺の術式 黒閃 御廚子 解 解

key_events_verified_phase11: ミゲルとラルゥが参戦し、夏油への弔いとして高専側へ協力する。
ミゲルは術式で自らを強化し宿儺の能力を弱め、ラルゥは心をつかむ術式で隙を作る。
ミゲルは肉体強化と相手の弱体化を同時に行う祈祷の歌で宿儺と渡り合う。
ラルゥの心身掌握は巨大な手で身体を掴み、さらに心へ干渉できる。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
